chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-904 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi 07.02.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. alongwith SIP Muhammad Ali S.H.O P.S Sarhari on behalf of DIGP Shaheed Benazirabad and SSP Sanghar. Mr. Zohaib Hassan Pahore, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Ashfaque Ali Khaskheli, advocate for petitioners, under the instructions does not press this Constitutional Petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
